# reply-to-pr-comments

Respond to replies on your bot comments on GitHub PRs, and re-trigger review when feedback is addressed.

- **Command:** `/reply-to-pr-comments`
- **Schedule:** :17,47
- **Source:** none
- **Required inputs:** none
- **Backend:** `claude`

## Inputs

| Input | Default | Notes |
|-------|---------|-------|
| `bot_marker` | `🤖` |  |
| `verbosity` | `full` | full → reply includes a one-line rationale; compact → terse reply. |

## Gate

`discover.sh` decides whether the daemon fires on a given run.

See [skill/SKILL.md](skill/SKILL.md) for the full prompt.
